subject: Project pulse: mainecoon execution in Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q1 review | INIT-6321
body: Following yesterday's call, the mainecoon effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Frida Kahlo and Alan Turing. Reference initiative INIT-6321. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: handoff, review.
